debug_info.goal:
case cons
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
elt hd : α
tl : List α
HR : ∀ {idx : ℕ} {hidx : idx ≤ l1.length}, (tl ++ l2).insertIdx idx elt = tl.insertIdx idx elt ++ l2
idx : ℕ
hidx : idx ≤ l1.length
⊢ (hd :: (tl ++ l2)).insertIdx idx elt = (hd :: tl).insertIdx idx elt ++ l2

proof:
cases idx with
        | zero => simp [List.insertIdx]
        | succ n =>
          simp only [List.insertIdx_succ_cons, List.cons_append, List.cons.injEq, true_and]
          exact HR (hidx := by omega)
